cards.back: The unfair or discriminatory treatment of individuals or groups in AI decision-making processes
The ability to understand how an AI system makes decisions or predictions
The responsibility of developers, users, and regulators to ensure AI systems are developed and used in ways that align with societal values
The process of designing AI systems whose goals and values align with human values and principles
Set of rules, laws, and guidelines that govern the development and use of AI systems to ensure they are safe, secure, and transparent
